ground_truth.title: 6 Gardening Shows to Watch for Backyard Inspiration
ground_truth.author: Emily Baron Cadloff
ground_truth.main_content:
As the backyard gardening season starts wrapping up in many areas across the country, now is the perfect time to reflect on how well your garden actually served your needs. Were your tomatoes as fruitful as they could have been or do they need more sunlight? Did you end up with a bumper crop of zucchini and want to cut down for next year? Or maybe you're interested in getting more color into your space and want to figure out which flowers to plant and where. But if you're not sure where to start on your garden redesign, we've got you covered. Here are some of the best shows out there to get you started with a little garden inspiration. Before you get planting, start streaming.

Homegrown on Magnolia Network: Host Jamila Norman is a backyard farming expert, turning rundown patches of grass into urban oases.
with: As the backyard gardening season starts wrapping up in many areas across the country, now is the perfect time to reflect on how well your garden actually served your needs.
If you're looking to take your backyard from frumpy to full-on farming, this is your show.
You don't need a huge plot of land with this approach - with a few planters on a stoop, balcony or windowsill, you can still be a gardener.
Host Carol Klein is an enthusiastic and helpful guide, showcasing jaw-dropping gardens across Britain.
without: Follow us on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X
